message:
docs: update tryScrollBlit comment to reflect lastFrameHadPostProcess check

The previous comment was outdated - it said post-process artifacts "may" be
included in the blit, but the lastFrameHadPostProcess check (added earlier)
ensures we never blit post-processed content.
